use_cases: Display pricing plans side-by-side with visual chart comparisons for SaaS products
Show pricing evolution or trends alongside subscription tier options
Enable users to compare feature tiers with graphical data representation
ai_summary: A pricing component that displays multiple subscription tiers alongside integrated chart visualizations, allowing users to compare plans with data-driven insights. Designed for SaaS and software products to showcase pricing structure with trend or feature comparison data in an interactive format.
